---
title: "The Largest Group, by Neighbourhood"
description: "Each census tract coloured by its largest population group (plurality) — 2021 Census"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os, json
import pandas as pd
from pipeline.charts import (choropleth_categorical, choropleth_groups_map,
                             DIVERSITY_MAP_GROUPS, CATEGORICAL_PALETTE)
```

Instead of one group's share at a time, this map colours each **census tract** by
its **largest single group** (2021 Census). A plurality is not a majority — in
mixed neighbourhoods the leading group may hold well under half — so **hover for
the tract's full mix**, which makes a 90% tract read differently from a 31% one.
White-plurality tracts, most of the country, are deliberately drawn in a neutral
grey so colour is reserved for distinguishing the other groups.

Groups are the same as on the [Diversity](diversity.qmd) page (StatCan's visible
minority groups, plus derived **White** and **Indigenous** from the same census
base — the derivation is described there). Descriptive only: this maps where
people live, nothing more.

[← Back to Diversity](diversity.qmd)

```{python}
#| echo: false
eth_geo = "data/geo/ct_2021.geojson"
eth_path = "data/geo/statcan_ct_ethnicity_2021.csv"
if os.path.exists(eth_geo) and os.path.exists(eth_path):
    geo = json.load(open(eth_geo))
    eth = pd.read_csv(eth_path, dtype={"ctuid": str})
    sub = eth.dropna(subset=["all_vm"]).copy()
    gdefs = [g for g in DIVERSITY_MAP_GROUPS if g[0] != "all_vm"]
    gcols = [g[0] for g in gdefs]
    glabels = {g[0]: g[1] for g in gdefs}
    sub["largest"] = sub[gcols].astype(float).idxmax(axis=1).map(glabels)

    def _mix(row):
        s = row[gcols].astype(float).sort_values(ascending=False)
        s = s[s >= 0.5]                      # the tract's full mix, smallest slivers dropped
        return "<br>".join(f"{glabels[c]}: {v:.1f}%" for c, v in s.items())
    sub["detail"] = sub.apply(_mix, axis=1)

    order = sub["largest"].value_counts().index.tolist()
    cmap = {lab: CATEGORICAL_PALETTE[i % len(CATEGORICAL_PALETTE)]
            for i, lab in enumerate([l for l in order if l != "White"])}
    cmap["White"] = "#d4d4d4"
    fig = choropleth_categorical(geo, sub, "ctuid", "largest", name_col="name",
        ordered=order, color_map=cmap, detail_col="detail", height=700,
        center={"lat": 51.5, "lon": -96.0}, zoom=3.0,
        source_note="Source: 2021 Census (Statistics Canada, Census Profile 98-401-X2021007). Largest single group per tract (plurality); hover shows the tract's full mix (groups ≥0.5%). White is derived (Not a visible minority − Indigenous identity); Indigenous = Indigenous identity. Descriptive only.")
    fig.show(config={"displaylogo": False, "scrollZoom": True, "modeBarButtonsToRemove": ["lasso2d", "select2d"]})
else:
    print("Map not yet available — run `python -m pipeline.build_census_geo`.")
```

[← Back to Diversity](diversity.qmd)
